changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jhi_authority WHERE name = 'ROLE_PARENT'

changeSet.comment: Add ROLE_PARENT authority if it does not exist

changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM jhi_user_authority WHERE authority_name = 'ROLE_FAMILY_ADMIN') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.comment: Migrate ROLE_FAMILY_ADMIN user mappings to ROLE_PARENT

delete.where: authority_name = 'ROLE_FAMILY_ADMIN' AND user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM jhi_user_authority WHERE authority_name = 'ROLE_PARENT')

changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM jhi_authority WHERE name = 'ROLE_FAMILY_ADMIN') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.comment: Remove legacy ROLE_FAMILY_ADMIN authority row after migration
